'''thorazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:leachy|leachy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-r-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leachy|leachy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thorazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thorazhithi|thorazhithi]] || [[word:thorazhiji|thorazhiji]] || [[word:thorazhishi|thorazhishi]] || [[word:thorazhiki|thorazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thorazhuthuthu|thorazhuthuthu]] || [[word:thorazhujuju|thorazhujuju]] || [[word:thorazhushushu|thorazhushushu]] || [[word:thorazhukuku|thorazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorazhuthu|thorazhuthu]] || [[word:thorazhuju|thorazhuju]] || [[word:thorazhushu|thorazhushu]] || [[word:thorazhuku|thorazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorazhufthuf|thorazhufthuf]] || [[word:thorazhufjuf|thorazhufjuf]] || [[word:thorazhufshuf|thorazhufshuf]] || [[word:thorazhufkuf|thorazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thorazhethe|thorazhethe]] || [[word:thorazheje|thorazheje]] || [[word:thorazheshe|thorazheshe]] || [[word:thorazheke|thorazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thorazhothotho|thorazhothotho]] || [[word:thorazhojojo|thorazhojojo]] || [[word:thorazhoshosho|thorazhoshosho]] || [[word:thorazhokoko|thorazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorazhotho|thorazhotho]] || [[word:thorazhojo|thorazhojo]] || [[word:thorazhosho|thorazhosho]] || [[word:thorazhoko|thorazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorazhofthof|thorazhofthof]] || [[word:thorazhofjof|thorazhofjof]] || [[word:thorazhofshof|thorazhofshof]] || [[word:thorazhofkof|thorazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thorazhĂŻfthĂŻf|thorazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thorazhĂŻfjĂŻf|thorazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thorazhĂŻfshĂŻf|thorazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thorazhĂŻfkĂŻf|thorazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thorazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thorazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thorazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thorazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thorazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thorazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thorazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thorazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorazhĂŻfthĂŻf|thorazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thorazhĂŻfjĂŻf|thorazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thorazhĂŻfshĂŻf|thorazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thorazhĂŻfkĂŻf|thorazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorazhĂŻfthĂŻf|thorazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thorazhĂŻfjĂŻf|thorazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thorazhĂŻfshĂŻf|thorazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thorazhĂŻfkĂŻf|thorazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thorazhĂŠthĂŠ|thorazhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thorazhĂŠjĂŠ|thorazhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thorazhĂŠshĂŠ|thorazhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thorazhĂŠkĂŠ|thorazhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thorazhathatha|thorazhathatha]] || [[word:thorazhajaja|thorazhajaja]] || [[word:thorazhashasha|thorazhashasha]] || [[word:thorazhakaka|thorazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorazhatha|thorazhatha]] || [[word:thorazhaja|thorazhaja]] || [[word:thorazhasha|thorazhasha]] || [[word:thorazhaka|thorazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorazhafthaf|thorazhafthaf]] || [[word:thorazhafjaf|thorazhafjaf]] || [[word:thorazhafshaf|thorazhafshaf]] || [[word:thorazhafkaf|thorazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thorazhasha|thorazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thorazhshĂ«sha|thorazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thorazhrosha|thorazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thorazhmusha|thorazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thorazhyasha|thorazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothorazhnkshĂ«sha|gothorazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothorazhnkrosha|gothorazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothorazhnkmusha|gothorazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothorazhnkyasha|gothorazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thorarazhasha|thorarazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thorarazhshĂ«sha|thorarazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thorarazhrosha|thorarazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thorarazhmusha|thorarazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thorarazhyasha|thorarazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothorarazhnkshĂ«sha|gothorarazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothorarazhnkrosha|gothorarazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothorarazhnkmusha|gothorarazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothorarazhnkyasha|gothorarazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:therĂŠzhasha|therĂŠzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:therĂŠzhshĂ«sha|therĂŠzhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:therĂŠzhrosha|therĂŠzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:therĂŠzhmusha|therĂŠzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:therĂŠzhyasha|therĂŠzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotherĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha|gotherĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotherĂŠzhnkrosha|gotherĂŠzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotherĂŠzhnkmusha|gotherĂŠzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotherĂŠzhnkyasha|gotherĂŠzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thorfazhasha|thorfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thorfazhshĂ«sha|thorfazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thorfazhrosha|thorfazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thorfazhmusha|thorfazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thorfazhyasha|thorfazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothorfazhnkshĂ«sha|gothorfazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothorfazhnkrosha|gothorfazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothorfazhnkmusha|gothorfazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothorfazhnkyasha|gothorfazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
